subject: FW: Letter for JE
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Monday, October 01, 2007 9:04 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Letter for JE



Dear Lesley,

At long last, that "tax letter" for your accountants is attached, but it
is more than that -

I read the newspapers early this morning - coverage re: Palm Beach - so
I'm (sorta) glad it took me this long to get around to it (three grant
applications worth!)

May I ask you to ensure Jeffrey sees /hears the last paragraph of the
letter?

Please remind him that boys from The Bronx (even if they end up at
Harvard) have long memories, know all about cops, and stay true to their
friends through thick and thin (no less peccadilloes).

Please let me know if you'd like me to fax a properly signed hard copy
(I have the fax # you sent) and if you need any additional identifying
info for The Institute.

Best,
Mark
mtramo@hms.harvard.edu
